RecipeDef.label: make charcoal
RecipeDef.description: Char wood into charcoal at a campfire.

RecipeDef.label: smelt small molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Smelt a small batch of steel into molten iron at a blast furnace.
RecipeDef.jobString: Smelting a small molten iron bloom.

RecipeDef.label: smelt medium molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Smelt a medium batch of steel into molten iron at a blast furnace.
RecipeDef.jobString: Smelting a medium molten iron bloom.

RecipeDef.label: smelt large molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Smelt a large batch of steel into molten iron at a blast furnace.
RecipeDef.jobString: Smelting a large molten iron bloom.

RecipeDef.label: refine carbon steel from small molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Refine a small molten iron bloom with iron ore in a converter to produce carbon steel.

RecipeDef.label: refine carbon steel from medium molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Refine a medium molten iron bloom with iron ore in a converter to produce carbon steel.

RecipeDef.label: refine carbon steel from large molten iron bloom
RecipeDef.description: Refine a large molten iron bloom with iron ore in a converter to produce carbon steel.

RecipeDef.label: refine crude oil into diesel
RecipeDef.description: Refine low quality crude oil into diesel fuel.

RecipeDef.label: refine crude oil into kerosene
RecipeDef.description: Refine low quality crude oil into kerosene fuel.

RecipeDef.label: refine crude oil into naphtha
RecipeDef.description: Distill a small amount of volatile naphtha from low quality crude oil.

RecipeDef.label: make plain dog chew
RecipeDef.description: Make a plain BTX-infused dog chew from naphtha and leather.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph crude oil contract
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a sale order for low quality crude oil and receive Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph diesel contract
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a sale order for diesel and receive Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph kerosene contract
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a sale order for kerosene and receive Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph government bond purchase
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a purchase order for a Vesenica government bond using Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph government bond purchase x5
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk purchase order for five Vesenica government bonds using Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Continental Petroleum bond purchase
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a purchase order for a Continental Petroleum corporate bond using Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Continental Petroleum bond purchase x5
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk purchase order for five Continental Petroleum corporate bonds using Sthaler banknotes.
RecipeDef.jobString: Transmitting bulk Continental Petroleum bond purchase.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph gold exchange to Sthaler
RecipeDef.description: Transmit an exchange order to convert gold into Sthaler banknotes.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph gold exchange to Sthaler x10
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk exchange order to convert gold into Sthaler banknotes.
RecipeDef.jobString: Transmitting bulk gold to Sthaler exchange.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Sthaler exchange to gold
RecipeDef.description: Transmit an exchange order to convert Sthaler banknotes into gold.

RecipeDef.label: telegraph Sthaler exchange to gold x10
RecipeDef.description: Transmit a bulk exchange order to convert Sthaler banknotes into gold.
RecipeDef.jobString: Transmitting bulk Sthaler to gold exchange.

RecipeDef.label: make shaft
RecipeDef.description: Turn carbon steel into a straight mechanical shaft on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: convert component into general machine part
RecipeDef.description: Rework a standard industrial component into a general-purpose machine part at a basic workbench.
RecipeDef.jobString: Converting component into general machine part.

RecipeDef.label: press component
RecipeDef.description: Stamp carbon steel into rough press components with the hydraulic press.

RecipeDef.label: press component x5
RecipeDef.description: Stamp carbon steel into rough press components with the hydraulic press.

RecipeDef.label: press component x10
RecipeDef.description: Stamp carbon steel into rough press components with the hydraulic press.

RecipeDef.label: mill general machine part
RecipeDef.description: Mill carbon steel into a general-purpose machine part.

RecipeDef.label: mill general machine part x5
RecipeDef.description: Mill carbon steel into general-purpose machine parts.

RecipeDef.label: mill general machine part x10
RecipeDef.description: Mill carbon steel into general-purpose machine parts.

RecipeDef.label: turn general machine part
RecipeDef.description: Slowly turn extra carbon steel into a general-purpose machine part on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: turn general machine part x5
RecipeDef.description: Turn extra carbon steel into general-purpose machine parts on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: turn general machine part x10
RecipeDef.description: Turn extra carbon steel into general-purpose machine parts on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: roll uniform steel plate
RecipeDef.description: Roll carbon steel into an even, uniform steel plate.

RecipeDef.label: make low quality gun barrel
RecipeDef.description: Bore and turn a low-quality metal gun barrel from carbon steel on a lathe.

RecipeDef.label: make shotgun barrel
RecipeDef.description: Bore and turn a heavy metal shotgun barrel from carbon steel on a workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make low quality gun barrel by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly bore and finish a low-quality metal gun barrel from carbon steel at a basic workbench.
RecipeDef.jobString: Making low quality gun barrel by hand.

RecipeDef.label: make shotgun barrel by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly bore and finish a heavy shotgun barrel from carbon steel at a basic workbench.

RecipeDef.label: make medium quality gun barrel by hand
RecipeDef.description: Slowly bore and rifle a medium quality gun barrel from carbon steel and a general machine part at a basic workbench.
RecipeDef.jobString: Making medium quality gun barrel by hand.

RecipeDef.label: craft Graylock M1861
RecipeDef.description: Craft Graylock M1861 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Ironfang M1860 Army
RecipeDef.description: Craft Ironfang M1860 Army using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Ironfang SAA
RecipeDef.description: Craft Ironfang SAA using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft W&M Model 3
RecipeDef.description: Craft W&M Model 3 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Ironfang M1911
RecipeDef.description: Craft Ironfang M1911 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: make primary cell
RecipeDef.description: Assemble a primary cell (chemical battery) using steel and a general machine part.

RecipeDef.label: make medium quality gun barrel
RecipeDef.description: Bore and rifle a medium quality metal gun barrel from carbon steel and a general machine part.

RecipeDef.label: craft Graylock M1873
RecipeDef.description: Craft Graylock M1873 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Henry rifle
RecipeDef.description: Craft Henry rifle using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Frontier Arms M1887
RecipeDef.description: Craft Frontier Arms M1887 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Frontier Arms M1895
RecipeDef.description: Craft Frontier Arms M1895 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: convert Graylock M1861 into Graylock M1873
RecipeDef.description: Convert a Graylock M1861 into a Graylock M1873 breech-loading rifle, replacing its V-spring mechanism with a low-quality torsion spring.
RecipeDef.jobString: Converting Graylock M1861 into Graylock M1873.

RecipeDef.label: craft Graylock M1892
RecipeDef.description: Craft Graylock M1892 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Graylock M1903
RecipeDef.description: Craft Graylock M1903 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Frontier Arms M1897
RecipeDef.description: Craft Frontier Arms M1897 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Graylock M1903A4
RecipeDef.description: Craft Graylock M1903A4 using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft Graylock M1903 Whitmore device
RecipeDef.description: Craft Graylock M1903 Whitmore device using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1A1 Harrington
RecipeDef.description: Craft M1A1 Harrington using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M3A1 submachine gun
RecipeDef.description: Craft M3A1 submachine gun using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M9A1 recoilless launcher
RecipeDef.description: Craft an M9A1 recoilless launcher using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1 Hartwell
RecipeDef.description: Craft M1 Hartwell using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1918A2 HAR
RecipeDef.description: Craft M1918A2 HAR using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1D Hartwell
RecipeDef.description: Craft M1D Hartwell using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.

RecipeDef.label: craft M1919A6 light machine gun
RecipeDef.description: Craft M1919A6 light machine gun using firearm components at a workbench. Interrupted work is stored as an unfinished firearm with its remaining work.
